regions.name: Timber Town
regions.tagline: the wooden city the robots built

places.name: The Driftwood Docks
places.purpose: Arrival & orientation — name where you are today.

places.name: The Lighthouse
places.purpose: Grounding & safety — your steady light when the water is rough.

places.name: Tidepool Boardwalk
places.purpose: Sensory mindfulness — five senses at the water’s edge.

places.name: Mirror Lake
places.purpose: Reflection — see yourself, and let your partner truly see you.

places.name: The Gratitude Grove
places.purpose: Gratitude practice — hang one true thankful thing on the wishing tree.

places.name: Skipping-Stone Shore
places.purpose: Letting go — write the weight on a stone, then skip it across the water.

places.name: The Hollow Cabins
places.purpose: Couples’ retreat — an unhurried evening to reconnect.

places.name: Echo Canyon
places.purpose: Being heard — say the hard thing; the canyon repeats it back gently.

places.name: The Rope Bridges
places.purpose: Trust — cross together; one holds the rope while the other steps.

places.name: The Whispering Caves
places.purpose: Shadow work — meet the quiet worry you keep in the dark.

places.name: Sunstone Overlook
places.purpose: Perspective & awe — see how small today’s trouble is from up here.

places.name: Basecamp Meadow
places.purpose: Goal-setting — pack only what you’ll actually carry up.

places.name: The Switchback Trail
places.purpose: Persistence — the path bends back on itself, and still it climbs.

places.name: The Summit
places.purpose: Milestone & achievement — plant your flag; the robots ring the bell.

places.name: Snowdrift Hut
places.purpose: Rest & self-care — permission to stop and warm your hands.

places.name: The Gathering Bar
places.purpose: Connection — pull up a stool; the robots pour something warm and listen.

places.name: The Robot Workshop
places.purpose: Repair & self-compassion — the robots fix what’s broken without shame.

places.name: The Family Hearth
places.purpose: Family time — one table, the day’s highs and lows, no phones.

places.name: The Driftwood Amphitheater
places.purpose: Expression & play — say it as a song, a skit, a silly voice.

places.name: Market Square
places.purpose: Needs & choices — trade what you have too much of for what you lack.

places.name: The Golf Park
places.purpose: Playful challenge — lose gracefully, cheer each other, keep it light.

places.name: Kite Meadow
places.purpose: Play & letting the wind help — run, release, look up together.

places.name: The Butterfly Garden
places.purpose: Calm & sensory delight — go slow enough for one to land on you.

places.name: Lantern Park
places.purpose: Evening ritual — light one lantern for something you hope for.

places.name: Fern Hollow
places.purpose: Nature immersion — a green quiet that lowers the whole nervous system.

places.name: The Firefly Caves
places.purpose: Wonder & hope — the dark isn’t empty; it’s full of small lights.

places.name: The Old-Root Grove
places.purpose: Heritage & roots — trace the family tree carved into the great trunk.
